sqlMap.select: ( select * from ( SELECT b.`notifySubject`, b.`notifyContent`, b.`projectId`, a.`id` AS stateId, b.`createTime`, a.`checkTime`, notifyState FROM `pm_project_notification_state` a LEFT JOIN `pm_project_notification` b ON a.`notifyId` = b.`id` WHERE notifyObject = #username# AND notifyState = 0 ORDER BY b.`createTime` DESC ) as tmp ) UNION ALL ( SELECT b.`notifySubject`, b.`notifyContent`, b.`projectId`, a.`id` AS stateId, b.`createTime`, a.`checkTime`, notifyState FROM `pm_project_notification_state` a LEFT JOIN `pm_project_notification` b ON a.`notifyId` = b.`id` WHERE notifyObject = #username# AND notifyState = 1 ORDER BY a.`checkTime` DESC, b.`createTime` DESC LIMIT 100 )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE `pm_project_notification_state` SET notifyState = 1 ,checkTime = now() WHERE id = #id#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT t0.`projectCode`, t0.`projectName` ,t4.`basicDataName` AS projectStateName,t5.`basicDataName` AS taskName , t0.`projectId` , CASE WHEN t1.projectPlanState = 40 THEN DATEDIFF(NOW() , t6.createTime) WHEN t1.projectPlanState = 47 THEN DATEDIFF(NOW() , t1.projectplanTime) ELSE DATEDIFF( NOW() , t2.`eventPlanHappenDateENG`) END AS diff, t2.`eventPlanHappenDateENG` , t6.`memberName` AS programManager , t8.departmentName AS officeName FROM pm_project_header t0 LEFT JOIN pm_project_state t1 ON t0.`projectId` = t1.`projectId` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t4 ON t1.`projectPlanState` = t4.`basicDataId` AND t4.`dataTypeCode` = '22' LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t3 ON t4.`basicDataName` = t3.`basicDataName` AND t3.`dataTypeCode` = '09' LEFT JOIN pm_project_task t2 ON t2.`taskTypeCode` = t3.`dataTypeCode` AND t2.`taskTypeId` = t3.`basicDataId` AND t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND t2.`visibleFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t5 ON t1.`projectPlanState` = t5.`basicDataId` AND t5.`dataTypeCode` = '23' LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t6 ON t6.`projectId` = t0.`projectId` AND t6.`memberRole` = '30' AND t6.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t7 ON t7.`projectId` = t0.`projectId` AND t7.`memberRole` = '20' AND t7.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_department t8 ON t0.column001 = t8.departmentNum AND t8.`status` = 1 WHERE t0.`projectState` IN ( 30 ,31,32) AND t0.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND ( t2.`eventPlanHappenDateENG` IS NULL OR ( DATEDIFF( t2.`eventPlanHappenDateENG` , NOW()) < 7)) AND t1.`projectPlanState` != 48 AND t6.memberCode IS NOT NULL
t0.projectName like CONCAT('%', #taskQueryParam.projectName#, '%') t0.column001 = #taskQueryParam.officeCode# t6.memberCode = #taskQueryParam.programManager# (t7.memberCode = #taskQueryParam.serviceManager# or t6.memberCode = #taskQueryParam.serviceManager# )
limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pm_project_header t0 LEFT JOIN pm_project_state t1 ON t0.`projectId` = t1.`projectId` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t4 ON t1.`projectPlanState` = t4.`basicDataId` AND t4.`dataTypeCode` = '22' LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t3 ON t4.`basicDataName` = t3.`basicDataName` AND t3.`dataTypeCode` = '09' LEFT JOIN pm_project_task t2 ON t2.`taskTypeCode` = t3.`dataTypeCode` AND t2.`taskTypeId` = t3.`basicDataId` AND t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND t2.`visibleFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t5 ON t1.`projectPlanState` = t5.`basicDataId` AND t5.`dataTypeCode` = '23' LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t6 ON t6.`projectId` = t0.`projectId` AND t6.`memberRole` = '30' AND t6.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t7 ON t7.`projectId` = t0.`projectId` AND t7.`memberRole` = '20' AND t7.`effectiveTo` IS NULL WHERE t0.`projectState` IN ( 30 ,31,32) AND t0.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND ( t2.`eventPlanHappenDateENG` IS NULL OR ( DATEDIFF( t2.`eventPlanHappenDateENG` , NOW()) < 7)) AND t1.`projectPlanState` != 48 AND t6.memberCode IS NOT NULL
t0.projectName like CONCAT('%', #projectName#, '%') t0.column001 = #officeCode# t6.memberCode = #programManager# (t7.memberCode = #serviceManager# or t6.memberCode = #serviceManager#)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_project_notification t1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_header t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t3 ON t2.`projectId` = t3.`projectId` AND t3.`memberRole` = '20' AND t3.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t4 ON t2.`projectId` = t4.`projectId` AND t4.`memberRole` = '30' AND t4.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_department t5 ON t2.`column001` = t5.`departmentNum` AND t5.`status` = 1 where 1 = 1 and t2.projectId is not null
t2.projectName like CONCAT('%', #projectName#, '%') t2.column001 = #officeCode# t4.memberCode = #programManager# (t3.memberCode = #serviceManager# or t4.memberCode = #serviceManager#)

SELECT t1.`projectId`,t2.`projectName` , t5.`departmentName` , t1.`notifyContent`, t1.`createTime` , CONCAT( t1.`createBy` ,'-' ,t6.`realName`) as createBy, t4.`memberName` AS programManager , t3.`memberName` AS serviceManager FROM pm_project_notification t1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_header t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t3 ON t2.`projectId` = t3.`projectId` AND t3.`memberRole` = '20' AND t3.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t4 ON t2.`projectId` = t4.`projectId` AND t4.`memberRole` = '30' AND t4.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t6 ON t6.`username` = t1.`createBy` LEFT JOIN fnd_department t5 ON t2.`column001` = t5.`departmentNum` AND t5.`status` = 1 WHERE 1 = 1 and t2.projectId is not null
t2.projectName like CONCAT('%', #notifyQueryParam.projectName#, '%') t2.column001 = #notifyQueryParam.officeCode# t4.memberCode = #notifyQueryParam.programManager# ( t3.memberCode = #notifyQueryParam.serviceManager# or t4.memberCode = #notifyQueryParam.serviceManager# )
ORDER BY t1.`createTime` DESC
limit #notifyDisplayParam.offset#, #notifyDisplayParam.pagesize#

SELECT t1.projectCode ,t1.projectName , t4.departmentName AS officeName ,t3.basicDataName AS taskName, t5.memberName AS programManager,t1.projectId, CASE WHEN t1.isback = '38' THEN t2.memberCode ELSE '工程管理部' END AS ASSIGNEE_ , '项目回退流程' as procTypeDesc FROM pm_project_header t1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND t2.`memberRole` = '20' LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t5 ON t1.`projectId` = t5.`projectId` AND t5.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND t5.`memberRole` = '30' LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t3 ON t3.dataTypeCode = '23' AND basicDataId = '50' LEFT JOIN fnd_department t4 ON t1.column001 = t4.departmentNum AND t4.`status` = 1 WHERE t1.`projectState` IN (30,31,32) AND t1.effectiveTo IS NULL
t1.`isback` = #backstate#
t2.memberCode = #assignee#

SELECT t1.projectCode, t1.projectName, t4.departmentName AS officeName, "不予跟踪确认" AS taskName, t1.isback, t5.memberName AS programManager, t1.projectId, '工程管理部' AS ASSIGNEE_, "不予跟踪确认流程" AS procTypeDesc FROM pm_project_header t1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t2 ON t1.`projectId` = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND t2.`memberRole` = '20' LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t5 ON t1.`projectId` = t5.`projectId` AND t5.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND t5.`memberRole` = '30' LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t3 ON t3.dataTypeCode = '23' AND basicDataId = '50' LEFT JOIN fnd_department t4 ON t1.column001 = t4.departmentNum AND t4.`status` = 1 WHERE t1.`projectState` IN (30, 31, 32, 20) AND t1.isback IN ('42', '50') AND t1.effectiveTo IS NULL ;

SELECT t3.`projectCode` , t3.`projectName` , t4.`departmentName` AS officeName,t5.`memberName` as programManager, t1.`NAME_` as taskName,t3.`projectId` , CASE WHEN t6.`realName` IS NULL THEN '回访人员' ELSE CONCAT(t6.username,'-' , t6.realName) END AS ASSIGNEE_ ,t1.id_ , t2.applyTime ,t7.KEY_ ,t7.NAME_ as procTypeDesc , mm.memberName , CASE WHEN t3.column012 IS NULL AND t3.columno12_readonly = - 1 THEN t3.column012 WHEN t3.column012 IS NOT NULL THEN t3.column012 ELSE t3.columno12_readonly END AS implType, mm.memberName FROM act_ru_task t1 JOIN pm_cl_callback t2 ON t1.`PROC_INST_ID_` = t2.instId AND t2.`instId` IS NOT NULL AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN act_re_procdef t7 ON t1.PROC_DEF_ID_ = t7.ID_ LEFT JOIN pm_project_header t3 ON t2.`projectId` = t3.`projectId` LEFT JOIN fnd_department t4 ON t3.`column001` = t4.`departmentNum` AND t4.`status` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t5 ON t3.`projectId` = t5.`projectId` AND t5.`memberRole` = '30' AND t5.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN (SELECT m.projectId, GROUP_CONCAT(m.memberName) AS memberName FROM pm_project_member m WHERE m.effectiveTo IS NULL AND m.memberRole = '60' GROUP BY m.projectId) mm ON mm.projectId = t3.projectId LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t6 ON t1.`ASSIGNEE_` = t6.`username` AND t6.`status` = 1 WHERE t3.projectState != 20
( ASSIGNEE_ = 'callbackRole' or ASSIGNEE_ = #assignee# )
ASSIGNEE_ = #assignee#

SELECT t1.`projectCode` ,t1.`projectName` ,t2.`departmentName`, t3.`memberName` ,t0.`NAME_` , CASE WHEN t6.`realName` IS NULL THEN '工程管理部' ELSE CONCAT(t6.username,'-' , t6.realName) END AS ASSIGNEE_ , t0.`CREATE_TIME_` AS createTime ,t7.KEY_ ,t0.ID_,t1.presalesId,t7.NAME_ as procTypeDesc FROM act_ru_task t0 JOIN pm_presales_project_header t1 ON t0.`PROC_INST_ID_` = t1.`instId` LEFT JOIN fnd_department t2 ON t1.`officeCode` = t2.`departmentNum` AND t2.`status` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t3 ON t3.`projectId` = t1.`presalesId` AND t3.`memberRole` = '30' AND t3.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t6 ON t0.`ASSIGNEE_` = t6.`username` AND t6.`status` = 1 LEFT JOIN act_re_procdef t7 ON t0.PROC_DEF_ID_ = t7.ID_ WHERE 1 =1
( ASSIGNEE_ = 'emRole' or ASSIGNEE_ = #assignee# )
ASSIGNEE_ = #assignee#

SELECT t3.`projectCode` ,t3.`projectName` ,t4.`NAME_` ,'项目人员回访' AS taskName,t1.`applyBy` , t5.`realName` AS applyName, t6.`realName` AS assigneeName,t2.`assigneeTime` , t2.`result` ,t1.`projectId` , null AS projectCustomer, null AS projectCustomerTel FROM pm_cl_callback t1 LEFT JOIN fnd_act_hi_comment t2 ON t1.`instId` = t2.`instId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_header t3 ON t1.`projectId` = t3.`projectId` LEFT JOIN act_re_procdef t4 ON t2.`procdefKey` = t4.`KEY_` LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t5 ON t1.`applyBy` = t5.`username` AND t5.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t6 ON t2.`assignee` = t6.`username` AND t6.`effectiveTo` IS NULL WHERE t2.`assignee` = #username# and t2.procdefKey = 'CallBack'

SELECT m.id AS probId, m.probNum, m.theme, m.createTime, m.status, t1.`basicDataName` AS watchName, t2.`basicDataName` AS statusName, t3.basicDataName AS priorityName, t4.username as trackingUser, CONCAT(t4.username, '-', t4.realName) AS trackingUsername, d.`departmentName` AS officeName , m.customInfo FROM `prob_main` m LEFT JOIN `prob_restore` r ON m.`id` = r.`probId` LEFT JOIN `prob_restore_process` rp ON r.`processId` = rp.`id` LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON r.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t1 ON m.`watch` = t1.`basicDataId` AND t1.`dataTypeCode` = '30' AND t1.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t2 ON m.`status` = t2.basicDataId AND t2.dataTypeCode = '31' AND t1.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t3 ON m.`priority` = t3.`basicDataId` AND t3.`dataTypeCode` = '32' AND t1.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t4 ON m.trackingUser = t4.username
(
( ( r.assignee = #assignee#
r.officeCode IN ($areapower$)
) AND rp.`restoreStatus` = '10' )
OR m.watch = 15 )
AND ( m.`status` <> '10' AND m.`status` <> '6' AND m.`status` <> '8' AND m.`status` <> '1' )
( m.`status` <> '10' AND m.`status` <> '6' )
( m.`status` = '4' OR m.`status` = '5' )
( m.`status` = '6' and m.`trackingUser` = #assignee# )
and m.effectiveTo is null
GROUP BY m.`id` ORDER BY m.`watch` ASC, m.`priority` DESC, m.`id` DESC

SELECT ps.`projectId` AS applyNum , ps.`projectCode`, ps.`projectName`, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, pm.`memberName` AS realName, '工程人员' AS assigneeName, ps.`createTime`, "ProjectSupervision" AS procTypeName, "项目督查" AS procTypeDesc, "填写督查问卷" AS name FROM `pm_project_supervision` ps LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON ps.`projectId` = pm.`projectId` AND pm.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON ps.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` WHERE isdelete = FALSE AND state = FALSE
SELECT ID_ FROM ACT_RU_VARIABLE A0 WHERE A0.PROC_INST_ID_ = #instId# AND A0.NAME_ = #NAME_# AND A0.TYPE_ = #TYPE_# AND A0.TEXT_ = #TEXT_# ;
sqlMap.update: update ACT_RU_VARIABLE set TEXT_ = #TEXT_# where ID_ = #id#
UPDATE `act_ru_variable` SET TEXT_ = #value# WHERE PROC_INST_ID_ = #instId# AND NAME_ = #NAME_# AND TYPE_ = #TYPE_# AND TEXT_ = #TEXT_# ;
sqlMap.sql:
FROM ( SELECT a.`projectCode`, a.`projectName`, '项目闭环' AS `NAME_`, '项目人员回访' AS taskName, c.evaluationPeopleId AS `applyBy` , c.evaluationPeopleName AS applyName, a.evaluationPeopleName AS assigneeName, a.evaluationTime AS assigneeTime , a.evaluationResult AS RESULT, a.projectId , t1.column001 AS officeCode FROM pm_cl_evaluation_header a LEFT JOIN pm_cl_evaluation_header c ON a.applyHeaderId = c.id LEFT JOIN pm_project_header t1 ON a.projectId = t1.projectId WHERE a.evaluationPeopleId = #assignee# AND a.status = 1 t1.projectName like CONCAT('%', #taskQueryParam.projectName#, '%') t1.column001 = #taskQueryParam.officeCode# UNION ALL
SELECT t3.`projectCode` ,t3.`projectName` ,t4.`NAME_` ,'项目人员回访' AS taskName,t1.`applyBy` , t5.`realName` AS applyName, t6.`realName` AS assigneeName,t2.`assigneeTime` , t2.`result` ,t1.`projectId` , t3.column001 AS officeCode FROM fnd_act_hi_comment t2 LEFT JOIN pm_cl_callback t1 ON t1.`instId` = t2.`instId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_header t3 ON t1.`projectId` = t3.`projectId` LEFT JOIN act_re_procdef t4 ON t2.`procdefKey` = t4.`KEY_` LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t5 ON t1.`applyBy` = t5.`username` AND t5.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t6 ON t2.`assignee` = t6.`username` AND t6.`effectiveTo` IS NULL WHERE t2.`assignee` = #assignee# and t2.procdefKey = 'CallBack' t3.projectName like CONCAT('%', #taskQueryParam.projectName#, '%') t3.column001 = #taskQueryParam.officeCode# ) t LEFT JOIN fnd_department t2 ON t.officeCode = t2.departmentNum AND t2.`status` = 1
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT m.projectId , REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT_WS('-', trim(m.memberName), trim(m.phoneNum)) ORDER BY id), '\t', ''), '\r', ''), '\n', '') memberName
FROM pm_project_member m WHERE m.effectiveTo IS NULL AND m.memberRole = '60' GROUP BY m.projectId ) fc ON t.projectId = fc.projectId
t.projectName like CONCAT('%', #taskQueryParam.projectName#, '%') t.officeCode = #taskQueryParam.officeCode# fc.memberName like CONCAT('%', #taskQueryParam.projectCustomer#, '%')
sqlMap.select:
SELECT t.*, fc.memberName AS projectCustomer
limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#
